data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Follow-up appointment scheduling', which is explicitly listed in the linked use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete data or confirmation that a follow-up appointment has been scheduled. The absence of this critical information indicates a gap in the requirement coverage, as the expected result was not met.
gaps: No evidence of a follow-up appointment being scheduled or confirmed.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
